description_long: This is a large equestrian statue depicting a human figure seated atop a horse, both rendered in a realistic style. The sculpture is mounted on a substantial rectangular stone pedestal with multiple stepped layers and a slightly ornate base. The horse is shown in a dynamic pose with one front leg raised, while the rider sits upright, dressed in what appears to be formal or military attire. The surface of the statue has a greenish patina, typical of aged bronze, while the pedestal is a lighter stone color. Inscriptions or engravings are visible on the front face of the pedestal, suggesting commemorative or informational text. The overall impression is one of monumentality and historical significance, suitable for prominent public display.
description: A monumental equestrian statue of a human figure on horseback atop a large stone pedestal, featuring realistic details and a greenish bronze patina.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the horse and rider, with the horse's raised leg and the layered stone pedestal clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the back of the rider and horse, as well as the depth and shape of the pedestal.
description_view_2: Frontal view displaying the face of the rider, the horse's head, and the main inscription area on the pedestal.
description_view_3: Head-on view emphasizing the symmetry of the statue, the horse's stance, and the vertical alignment of the pedestal.
attribute_subject_matter: equestrian statue of a human figure on horseback
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is mounted on a large stone pedestal, suggesting an outdoor public space such as a plaza, park, or square.
